discount_rules: Save up to 15€ on a 45-minute Executive Detox Massage (original price 45€).
• Show a screenshot from your favourite fitness app at check-in, showing your 24-hour step total.
• The step count shown in your screenshot must be from within the last 10 days before your appointment.
• Discount will be applied in person.
• Offer valid exclusively for the 45-minute Executive Detox Massage.

about.therapist_cert: Cert. ISMET - Instituto Superior de Medicinas Tradicionales
about.approach_quote:
With a degree in cognitive behavioral psychology and a deep curiosity about how people think and act, I found myself working in marketing and data analysis, exploring behavior and trends.

At the same time, I kept nurturing my true passion—movement, balance, and energy. Inspired by martial arts and Eastern healing traditions, my focus naturally shifted. Since 2020, I've been dedicated to foot reflexology, Qi Gong, Yoga and subtle energy work, helping people restore harmony and well-being in a gentle, natural way.

signature_reflexology.title: Signature Reflexology Massage
signature_reflexology.description:
"This powerful reflexology treatment is for people living with chronic pain, long‑term discomfort or diagnosed conditions who want a focused, therapeutic approach to their health, not just a relaxing massage."

First, we move through the "3 Ways of Purification", awakening key reflex points and meridians in the feet to stimulate the body's natural detox pathways and encourage a general cleansing from within.

Then, a deep and intense reflexology phase works directly on points linked to your specific issues, using strong pressure to meet the pain and create space for release. This unique combination promotes profound healing and a grounded sense of relaxation, helping to correct underlying imbalances and support your overall well‑being.

executive_detox.title: Executive Detox Massage
executive_detox.description:
"A massage that combines inner cleansing through foot reflex points to restore balance and well-being."

We begin with a gentle warm-up using a natural oil to relax the feet and prepare them for deeper work. The session then transitions into a special ritual called "The 3 Ways of Purification", designed to support your body's natural cleansing processes. By stimulating specific reflex points, we encourage the elimination of toxins through the digestive, reproductive, and lymphatic systems, promoting a sense of lightness and inner balance.

— Eunice Ingham, the "mother of modern reflexology"
